title: Unfair practice
doc_html:
§1824.  Unfair practice

A violation of any of the provisions of this Chapter shall constitute an unfair practice under the provisions of R.S. 51:1401 through R.S. 51:1418.  

Added by Acts 1981, No. 814, §1.
doc_text:
§1824.  Unfair practice
A violation of any of the provisions of this Chapter shall constitute an unfair practice under the provisions of R.S. 51:1401 through R.S. 51:1418.
Added by Acts 1981, No. 814, §1.
